name: mathlib-ml-arch
description: Production-ready ML architecture audits grounded in Lean/mathlib evidence, with bootstrap, diagnostics, and fallback verification.

interface.shortDescription: Audit ML architecture claims with formal support boundaries
interface.longDescription: A production-ready skill-only plugin for ML architecture audits. It separates formal support, engineering inference, and empirical gaps, can bootstrap a local proofs project, surfaces theorem-aware search results, and emits compact review artifacts without UI or server dependencies.
defaultPrompt: Bootstrap a local proofs project for this workspace and verify the Lean setup
Audit this ML architecture for role mixing and hidden assumption leaks
Generate report.md and evidence.json for the current architecture review
Recheck the current architecture audit and tighten unsupported claims
